interfaces.name: getHomePageOverview
interfaces.description: Get data for the homepage hero and featured sections: coaches, packages, challenges, and recent blog posts.

interfaces.name: searchAllContent
interfaces.description: Global site-wide search across coaches, packages, challenges, worksheets, and blog articles.

interfaces.name: getCoachFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Coaches listing page.

interfaces.name: searchCoaches
interfaces.description: Search and filter coaches for the Coaches listing page.

interfaces.name: getCoachProfile
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific coach, including reviews and aggregates, for the Coach Profile page.

interfaces.name: getCoachAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available booking slots for a coach in a date range, optionally filtered by session length.

interfaces.name: bookCoachSession
interfaces.description: Book a one-on-one coaching session for a specific coach and availability slot.

interfaces.name: sendCoachContactMessage
interfaces.description: Send a contact or free consultation request message to a coach from the Coach Profile page.

interfaces.name: getPackageFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Services & Packages page.

interfaces.name: searchCoachingPackages
interfaces.description: Search and filter coaching packages for the Services & Packages listing page.

interfaces.name: getCoachingPackageDetail
interfaces.description: Get full detail for a specific coaching package, including related packages.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart with detailed items and subtotal. Cart is managed internally for the single user.

interfaces.name: addPackageToCart
interfaces.description: Add a coaching package to the current cart. Creates a cart if none exists.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a given cart item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Blog listing page.

interfaces.name: searchBlogArticles
interfaces.description: Search and filter blog articles by keyword, topic, audience, date range, and read time.

interfaces.name: getBlogArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full content and metadata for a blog article, including related articles and bookmark state.

interfaces.name: bookmarkArticle
interfaces.description: Bookmark or save a blog article for later viewing (simple favorites).

interfaces.name: unbookmarkArticle
interfaces.description: Remove a bookmark/favorite for a blog article.

interfaces.name: getReadingLists
interfaces.description: Get all reading lists created by the user, with article counts, for the Reading Lists page.

interfaces.name: getReadingListDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a reading list, including its saved articles.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Create a new named reading list for saving articles.

interfaces.name: renameReadingList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing reading list.

interfaces.name: deleteReadingList
interfaces.description: Delete a reading list and its associations (saved articles remain available outside the list).

interfaces.name: addArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a blog article to an existing reading list.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove an article from a specific reading list.

interfaces.name: getChallengeFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Challenges listing page.

interfaces.name: searchChallenges
interfaces.description: Search and filter challenges by topic, duration, and start date.

interfaces.name: getChallengeDetail
interfaces.description: Get full information for a specific challenge for the Challenge Detail page.

interfaces.name: enrollInChallenge
interfaces.description: Enroll the user in a challenge with specified reminder settings.

parameters.name: reminderTime
parameters.description: Time of day for reminders in 'HH:mm', e.g., '08:00'

interfaces.name: getAssessmentFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Assessments & Tools listing page.

interfaces.name: searchAssessments
interfaces.description: Search and filter assessments by category and question count.

interfaces.name: getAssessmentDetail
interfaces.description: Get full assessment definition and questions for the Assessment Detail page.

interfaces.name: startAssessment
interfaces.description: Start an assessment, creating an assessment instance for this user.

interfaces.name: completeAssessment
interfaces.description: Submit responses for an assessment instance, calculate score, and generate summary.

interfaces.name: saveAssessmentResultToDashboard
interfaces.description: Mark an assessment instance as saved to the Dashboard.

interfaces.name: getDashboardOverview
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the user's dashboard, including saved assessments, custom plans, and worksheets.

interfaces.name: getAssessmentResultDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a completed assessment instance from the Dashboard.

interfaces.name: getWorksheetFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Resources & Worksheets page.

interfaces.name: searchWorksheets
interfaces.description: Search and filter worksheets/resources by topic, audience, and page count.

interfaces.name: getWorksheetDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a worksheet, including save state, for the Worksheet Detail page.

interfaces.name: saveWorksheet
interfaces.description: Save a worksheet to the user's personal toolkit/Dashboard.

interfaces.name: getCustomPlanBuilderOptions
interfaces.description: Get available individual sessions and group workshops for the Custom Plan Builder page, plus basic pricing guidance.

interfaces.name: searchIndividualSessions
interfaces.description: Filter individual session offerings for the Custom Plan Builder.

interfaces.name: searchGroupWorkshops
interfaces.description: Filter group workshops for the Custom Plan Builder.

interfaces.name: saveCustomPlan
interfaces.description: Save a custom coaching plan with selected individual sessions and workshops. Total cost is calculated internally.

interfaces.name: getCustomPlans
interfaces.description: Get all saved custom coaching plans for the user (My Plans or Saved Plans section).

interfaces.name: getCustomPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a saved custom plan, including resolved session and workshop items.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About & Contact page (mission, values, background).

interfaces.name: sendGeneralContactMessage
interfaces.description: Send a general inquiry via the About & Contact page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user cart from storage and return its identifier.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal and update the Cart entity after changes.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateAssessmentScore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute an assessment score and summary based on question responses.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCustomPlanTotal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to sum prices of CustomPlanItems and update the CustomPlan.total_cost field.
